content:
OfficerID: hathawab, Narrative
Sir,
On above time date & location, while assigned to Z/C 9625 and in company with P.O. Hathaway#776. We received a code 2 radio broadcast to respond to 2120 E.4th street (Harry Buffalo) for a male fighting with staff. Once on scene we had the occasion to arrest (Dartanyous Ward) below are facts:
Upon our arrival we observed a male in Harry Buffalo shirt later identified as the manager Rpt#1 (David Howes) kneeling on the back ofOff#1 (Dartanyous Ward) outside on the side walk. As myselfand my partner approached both parties (Dartanyous) was hollering "I'mGoing To Fucking Spit On You" talking to (David). Myself and P.O. Hathaway#776 then placed (Dartanyous) in handcuffs w/o incident, searched himwhere we located a empty open plastic bottle of (Montebello Long Island Tea 20%byvolume) in his jacket pocket, we helped himup, and placed himin the rear ofour Z/C.
While on scene (David) states that (Dartanyous) walked into the restaurant heading towards the kitchen area where he was stopped and told you cant go back there, thinking he might be looking for the bathroom(David) points out where the men's roomis at. (David) states that (Dartanyous) then went up to a male patron sitting at the bar asking for money. (David) states that he approached (Dartanyous) and told himhe cant ask people for money in here and he had to leave. (Dartanyous) statred hollering "I aint asking for shit" "I aint asking for shit". (David) states he said Dude just get out of here, and started to gently nudge himcloser to the front doors. (David) States that (Dartanyous) says come closer I'll Fucking taze you, you got 3 seconds"! then reached towards his right rear ofhis back motioning like he was going pull out a tazer, causing Witness#1 & #2 sitting at the table to jump up in fear. (David) states that he continued to tell (Dartanyous) to leave or he continued to refuse, and then stated I'mgoing to punch you in the face. (David) further states that he was able to escort (Dartanyous) outside, where he continued to make threats, and try to come back in. (David) states that he placed (Dartanyous) on the ground and held himthere while on the phone with the dispatcher awaiting police to arrive.
Both Witness#1 & #2 (Williams) & (Swenson) both state that they were sitting at their table when this altercation occurred, and that they both were frightened when (Dartanyous) reached towards his back, motioning like he was going to pull out a tazer.
EMS#1 on scene Confwith 9606 on scene Misdemeanor Complaint Statement completed
WCS#3900 & 6187 along with video surveillance inside of (Harry Buffalo)
Page: 10 of 10
